audit_items.proof_trace: The only implicit free in zipmap.c occurs inside zipmapResize via zrealloc (L203). All three callers in zipmapSet correctly save p-zm offsets before each resize and re-derive p from the new zm afterward (L237-239, L257-261); the expand and shrink resize paths are mutually exclusive because the expand path sets freelen=reqlen making empty=0, preventing the shrink path. In zipmapDel, p is not dereferenced after the single resize at L287. No zfree is called anywhere in the file, eliminating double-free.
